_comment: GEO-optimized topic taxonomy for verhuizen in Nederland (expanded version). Topics are phrased as the questions people actually ask LLMs and search engines. Clustered into pillars for internal linking + topical authority. Expanded with many more topics per pillar + 4 new high-value pillars (utilities, work, renovation, storage). Prioritize new pillars and long-tail questions for quick wins in AI search / Google AI Overviews.
_geo_note: Question-shaped titles get extracted and cited by ChatGPT/Perplexity/Google AI Overviews far more than noun-phrase titles. Each topic below should become an H2 question with a direct 1-2 sentence answer immediately under it. Use natural, conversational Dutch.
